case_title: FERDINAND PAGKALINAWAN VS. EMILY ANN HUFF ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAGKALINAWAN, FERDINAND AS TO DEFENDANT HUFF, EMILY ANN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES TO MAR-28-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EMILY ANN HUFF WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. DEFENDANT DAN PETERSON WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS TO BRING SMOG CERTIFICATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
